signal.qualitative_note: PEG 4.74 driven by conservative 5y CAGR fallback (4.9%; eps_growth_5y unavailable from consensus) — CAUTION is purely valuation-based; no qualitative red flags. P/S 7.81 within BUY threshold on secondary lens.

meta.notes: eps_growth_5y unavailable from yfinance consensus; 5y CAGR derived via fallback formula (ntm_eps/clean_ttm_eps)^(1/5) − 1 = 4.9%. This is conservative — 1-year NTM/TTM growth rate is ~27%. PEG signal is methodology-sensitive here; P/S 7.81 (secondary lens) would yield BUY.
